summary: Comprehensive testing of TabPilot iteration 7 - 4 new features: Chrome API adapter, Tab Auto-Close Rules UI, Custom Workspace CRUD, Tab Previews on hover. All features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Auto-Close panel opens via timer icon button (data-testid='autoclose-toggle-btn')
Auto-Close panel has enable/disable toggle (data-testid='auto-close-toggle')
Auto-Close panel shows all time presets: 15min, 30min, 1h, 2h, Off, Custom
Auto-Close panel has whitelist section with domain list
Auto-Close panel has whitelist add input and button (data-testid='whitelist-input', 'whitelist-add-btn')
Auto-Close panel shows default whitelisted domains: mail.google.com, docs.google.com
Auto-Close panel shows 'at-risk tabs' count when enabled
Custom minutes input appears when 'Custom' preset selected
Workspace manager opens via briefcase button (data-testid='workspaces-toggle-btn')
Workspace manager has 'New' button (data-testid='create-workspace-btn')
Clicking 'New' shows creation form with name input, icon picker, color picker, tab selection
Workspace form tab picker shows all 14 tabs with checkboxes
Saving a workspace adds it to the list with Edit and Delete buttons
Preset workspaces (Deep Work, Meetings, Research, Break Time) visible without edit/delete buttons
Tab hover preview appears after ~350ms delay showing tab info card
Chrome adapter utility file exists at /app/frontend/src/utils/chromeAdapter.js
useChromeTabs hook exists at /app/frontend/src/hooks/useChromeTabs.js
Extension manifest.json has correct permissions: tabs, tabGroups, sidePanel, storage, activeTab
Extension background.js has badge updates and tab event monitoring
Backend POST /api/suggestions returns 201
Backend Sessions CRUD works correctly
All existing features work: search, tab groups, heatmap, command palette (Cmd+K), timeline, help panel, notes
seed_data_creation: Created test workspace 'Test Workspace' with 2 tabs
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features verified: (1) Chrome API adapter at /app/frontend/src/utils/chromeAdapter.js with isExtensionContext detection, (2) Auto-Close Panel at /app/frontend/src/components/tabpilot/AutoClosePanel.jsx with presets 15/30/60/120/off/custom and whitelist CRUD, (3) Workspace Manager at /app/frontend/src/components/tabpilot/WorkspaceManager.jsx with full CRUD and localStorage persistence, (4) Tab Preview at /app/frontend/src/components/tabpilot/TabPreview.jsx with 350ms delay hover card. Extension files in /app/extension/tabpilot/ with manifest.json having all required permissions. Key data-testids: autoclose-toggle-btn, auto-close-toggle, auto-close-preset-{id}, whitelist-input, whitelist-add-btn, at-risk-tabs, workspaces-toggle-btn, create-workspace-btn, workspace-form, workspace-name-input, workspace-save-btn, ws-tab-pick-{id}, workspace-{id}, tab-preview-{id}.

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Web preview uses mock data via mockData.js. Chrome adapter (chromeAdapter.js) detects extension context and falls back to mock in web preview.

new_features_verified.1_chrome_api_adapter: PASS - /app/frontend/src/utils/chromeAdapter.js exists with isExtensionContext() and Chrome API wrappers
new_features_verified.2_useChromeTabs_hook: PASS - /app/frontend/src/hooks/useChromeTabs.js exists with real Chrome API integration
new_features_verified.3_auto_close_panel: PASS - Timer presets (15/30/60/120min/off/custom), whitelist CRUD, at-risk tabs preview
new_features_verified.4_workspace_manager_crud: PASS - Create/Edit/Delete custom workspaces with name/icon/color/tab selection, localStorage persistence
new_features_verified.5_preset_workspaces: PASS - Deep Work, Meetings, Research, Break Time presets without edit/delete buttons
new_features_verified.6_tab_preview_hover: PASS - Hover preview card appears with tab info, stats, and note preview after 350ms delay
new_features_verified.7_extension_manifest: PASS - manifest.json has tabs, tabGroups, sidePanel, storage, activeTab permissions
new_features_verified.8_background_service_worker: PASS - background.js has badge updates and tab event monitoring
